news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN), located in Pasadena, California, the owning corporation of Applebee's Neighborhood Grill + Bar®, IHOP®, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop® restaurants, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.51 per common stock share. This dividend is scheduled for payment on July 9, 2025, to stockholders recorded by June 20, 2025.
news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. declares a $0.51 per share dividend, payable on July 9, 2025, to stockholders of record on June 20.

news.summary: Based in Foster City, California, Conviva, a leading provider of real-time performance analytics, released findings from their latest global study, the 2025 State of Digital Experience Report. In the modern attention-driven economy, providing top-notch digital experiences has become crucial for success in various sectors. Yet, the research indicates a concerning trend of escalating discontent among consumers who are becoming less tolerant of subpar online interactions. Shockingly, the report highlights that 91% of consumers have faced frustrating digital experiences.
news.headline: 91% consumers affected by poor digital experiences, impacting business revenues.

news.summary: In Davidson, North Carolina, Curtiss-Wright Corporation (NYSE: CW) revealed that their Board of Directors has approved an extra $400 million for upcoming share buybacks, bringing the total authorization to $534 million. Additionally, they announced a 14% raise in the quarterly dividend to $0.24 per share, with payments scheduled for July 7, 2025. Only stockholders recorded as of June 16, 2025, will receive the dividend. This move is part of the company's commitment to maintaining a steady capital allocation strategy.
news.headline: Curtiss-Wright boosts share repurchase authorization by $400 million and raises dividend by 14% to $0.24 per share.

OOTT  Forecasts For Global Oil Demand Growth In 202, 2026 Unchanged – OMR - Oil Supply Outside OPEC+ Seen Rising 800k Bpd This Year (prev Forecast 900k Bpd Rise) - Trims Forecast For Total US Oil Supply Growth In 2025 To 300k Bpd (Prev. Forecast 400k Bpd Growth)

news.summary: A prominent enterprise AI software platform provider, o9, has revealed plans for aim10x Europe 2025 - a complimentary in-person summit scheduled to occur in Amsterdam on June 3. This summit will unite leaders from various sectors such as supply chain, commercial, finance, IT, and procurement to delve into AI-infused enterprise planning. Notable speakers from renowned Fortune 500 firms, like a top player in the refractories sector, are slated to participate in the one-day event.
news.headline: o9 to host AI-driven enterprise planning summit aim10x Europe 2025 in Amsterdam on June 3 with Fortune 500 speakers.

news.summary: Lake Forest, Illinois - Reynolds Consumer Products has recently disclosed alterations within its executive leadership team. Further information regarding this change have not been disclosed.
news.headline: Reynolds Consumer Products in Lake Forest, Ill. announces executive leadership team changes, according to a report by Business Wire.

news.summary: WareSpace has recently expanded its operations in North Richland Hills, showcasing the increasing demand for small warehouse spaces in Texas. This expansion is indicative of the growing need for such facilities across the state. WareSpace, a prominent provider of small warehouse spaces nationwide, made this move in response to the robust demand in the market. The company's expansion signifies a strategic decision to capitalize on the thriving industrial real estate sector. The expansion in North Richland Hills underlines the company's commitment to meeting the needs of businesses seeking storage and distribution solutions. This development reflects the trend of companies requiring efficient and accessible warehouse spaces.
news.headline: WareSpace expands in Fort Worth due to growing demand for small warehouse space in Texas.

news.summary: Bothell, Washington - On May 14, 2025, BioLife Solutions, Inc., a prominent company in the cell and gene therapy industry, declared their engagement in an investor event. The company, listed on the NASDAQ as BLFS, is known for providing bioproduction products and services.
news.headline: BioLife Solutions (NASDAQ: BLFS) to join investor conferences in May and June 2025, as a key player in bioproduction market.

news.summary: San Diego, CA - On May 14, 2025, Seasats, a company from the United States specializing in autonomous maritime technology, unveiled the Lightfish Security System. This innovative turnkey autonomous surface vehicle (ASV) is specifically crafted to enhance persistent intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance capabilities.
news.headline: Seasats launches Lightfish Security System, a cost-effective ASV for maritime awareness. Released on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In May 14, 2025, in Washington, a collaboration has been ongoing for two years between the Institute for Financial Integrity (IFI) and the international law firm Crowell & Moring. This partnership focuses on delivering a training program worldwide with the goal of enhancing comprehension of sanctions and strategic trade controls.
news.headline: Institute for Financial Integrity and Crowell & Moring collaborate for 2 years on global sanctions and export controls training program.

news.summary: Vintage Investment Partners, a prominent venture capital platform founded in 2003 with $4.3 billion in assets under management, has recently opened its inaugural European office in London. This new expansion signifies a significant milestone for the company, showcasing its commitment to further establishing a presence in new markets. Leyla Holterud has been appointed as Partner to spearhead operations and growth in this region.
news.headline: Vintage Investment Partners, with $4.3B AUM, opens London office, names Leyla Holterud as Partner.

news.summary: In the breakthrough month of April 2025, Stark Future, based in Barcelona, Spain, set new records with €18.3 million in revenue and a positive EBITDA of €2.8 million. As the top contender in high-performance electric motorcycles worldwide, this achievement marks a significant milestone for the company.
news.headline: Stark Future achieved record profitability with €18.3M revenue and €2.8M EBITDA in April 2025. Leading in electric motorcycles.

news.summary: Strolid Inc., a tech-enabled automotive service company, has appointed new leadership to enhance Business Development Corporation (BDC) growth and promote the adoption of vCon conversational intelligence solutions within the industry. The announcement was made in Salem, N.H. on May 14, 2025. This move is expected to bolster Strolid's position in the market and drive innovation.
news.headline: Strolid appoints Michael Donovan as VP of Marketing to drive growth and adoption of vCon solutions.

news.summary: In Olathe, Kansas, on May 14, 2025, it was reported that PSI Services, a prominent company in licensure testing worldwide, has been chosen by the New Hampshire Insurance Department (NHID) to conduct insurance licensing exams in the state. Starting July 1, 2025, PSI will take over this responsibility.
news.headline: PSI Services chosen to administer insurance licensing exams in New Hampshire. Partnership starts July 1, 2025.

news.summary: Pleasanton, California - Nationwide has been acknowledged for their excellence in customer insight through their collaboration with Medallia and Kantar. The partnership has garnered national recognition for Nationwide's efforts in understanding and analyzing customer feedback.
news.headline: Nationwide honored for customer insight excellence with Medallia and Kantar; collaboration praised.

news.summary: NeuVentus, LLC, a Texas-based energy delivery infrastructure developer, has initiated a non-binding open season for natural gas storage at its Texas Reliability Underground Hub (TRU Hub) salt cavern storage project in Liberty County, Texas. The bidding process will commence at 9:00 a.m. Central Time on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, and will end at 5:00 p.m. Central Time on Friday, June 27, 2025. This opportunity allows interested parties to participate in securing storage capacity at this location.
news.headline: NeuVentus opens bidding for up to 20B cubic feet gas storage at TRU Hub Salt Cavern Storage Project in Texas.

news.summary: A federal lobbying arm called TSG Advocates, affiliated with The Southern Group, has recently made significant strides in expanding its presence in Washington. The team has welcomed three notable hires: Brian Darling, Beau Rothschild, and Kaitlyn Roberts. With their combined expertise, these individuals bring valuable experience and extensive networks within key branches of the federal government, namely the U.S. Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House. This strategic move aims to enhance client services by providing enhanced access and specialized knowledge in navigating federal regulations and policies.
news.headline: TSG Advocates hires Brian Darling, Beau Rothschild, and Kaitlyn Roberts from Senate, House, and White House to boost lobbying presence in Washington.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that a significant increase in job opportunities was observed in the tech industry. Over 500,000 new positions were created in the past year alone, marking a 15% growth compared to the previous year. This surge in job openings is attributed to the expanding demand for tech-related services and products in the market. Additionally, it was noted that the average salary in the tech sector has risen by 10%, now standing at $95,000 per year. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue as technology continues to play a crucial role in various industries.
news.headline: Toro Company set to reveal Q2 fiscal 2025 financial report.

news.summary: Today, NSF, a prominent global health and safety organization based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, unveiled important insights from a recent survey regarding the impact of food labeling on consumer choices in the United States. The study highlighted the significant emphasis placed by consumers on health and wellness, indicating a prevalent trend. With the rise in popularity of label-review applications and shortcomings in essential food labeling details in online retail, the research indicated a growing number of consumers critically analyzing labels. This underlines the importance of clear and comprehensive food labeling in aiding consumer decision-making.
news.headline: NSF survey shows Americans seek clarity in food labeling; emphasize health and wellness. Consumers want standardized information.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on May 14, 2025, Lipocine Inc. (NASDAQ: LPCN), a biopharmaceutical firm utilizing its unique technology platform for improved oral drug delivery, revealed plans to participate at A.G.P.'s Annual Healthcare Company event.
news.headline: Lipocine Inc. (NASDAQ: LPCN) to present at A.G.P.'s Annual Healthcare Company Showcase on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: A recent survey has revealed increasing pressure and overlooked chances in the areas of migrations, security, and AI implementation. ShareGate by Workleap, a top tool used worldwide for evaluating, migrating, and enhancing Microsoft 365 migrations, has disclosed the findings. The survey, released on May 14, 2025, sheds light on significant challenges faced by organizations.
news.headline: IT leaders are dealing with huge M&A activities, facing AI and security challenges. ShareGate by Workleap survey highlights pressure in migrations, security, and AI adoption.

news.summary: The biggest rural Epic health system in the country has chosen Cedar to improve the patient financial experience in the Midwest. On May 14, 2025, Cedar, the top platform for patient financial experiences in healthcare, revealed a collaboration with them.
news.headline: Sanford Health partners with Cedar to improve patient financial experience in rural areas. (Words: 12)

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, the U.S. Best Managed Companies program revealed its list of honorees for 2025. Sponsored by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal, this year's selection includes 61 top U.S. private companies that excelled in various areas. The companies showcased excellence in four key dimensions, solidifying their positions as leaders in the private sector.
news.headline: Deloitte Private & The Wall Street Journal reveal 61 honorees for U.S. Best Managed Companies 2025 program.

news.summary: A new single-family home rental community in Graniteville, SC, near Augusta, GA, has been acquired by Covey Homes by MORE. The community, named Covey Homes Midsomer, provides easy access to Augusta and is located just northeast of the city. This purpose-built development offers modern living spaces for rent. The acquisition was announced on May 14, 2025, by Covey Homes by MORE.
news.headline: Covey Homes by MORE acquires new rental community in Graniteville, SC near Augusta, GA for Sun Belt expansion.

news.summary: During the recent 78th Cannes Film Festival, it was revealed that a new award category will be introduced to honor the convergence of creativity, technology, and entrepreneurship. The announcement was made in Arlington, Virginia on May 14, 2025, by the Consumer Technology Association (CTA). As the organization behind CES, a prominent tech event, CTA aims to highlight innovative initiatives in this realm.
news.headline: CTA and Cannes' Marché Du Film collaborate on a new filmmaking and distribution category for CES Innovation Awards®, recognizing creativity, tech, and business.

news.summary: For the second consecutive year, Combined Insurance Company of America, a subsidiary of Chubb, has been recognized as the top performer in voluntary sales growth in the large carrier category for 2024. Eastbridge Consulting Group awarded them this title, solidifying their position as a leader in the industry. This accomplishment highlights their success in boosting sales figures, emphasizing the company's strong performance and growth trajectory. The recognition underscores their ability to drive revenue and capture market share, cementing their reputation as a top player in the insurance sector.
news.headline: Eastbridge Consulting Group names Combined Insurance as 2024 Voluntary Sales Growth Leader for 2nd year in large carrier category.

news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, dunnhumby ventures, the strategic venture capital and open innovation branch of dunnhumby, a global leader in Customer Data Science, revealed the forthcoming Retail Innovation Forum Americas set to take place on September 18, 2025. This event aims to facilitate connections among senior decision-makers within the retail sector, operating within one of the most expansive open innovation ecosystems in the industry. Since its launch in 2024, the Retail Innovation Network has successfully organized numerous oversubscribed events in Bentonville, shaping the future of retail collaboration.
news.headline: dunnhumby ventures' Retail Innovation Network grows as industry demand for open innovation increases. Hosting event in Bentonville Sep 18, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 14, 2025, Montreal-based company Otodata has successfully acquired Dunraven Systems' Delta software platform. With a remarkable track record of over two decades, Dunraven Systems has led the way in creating innovative monitoring solutions via their software platform. Otodata, established in 2008, has now expanded its technological portfolio by incorporating the advanced capabilities offered by the Delta software platform into its operations. This acquisition marks a significant move for Otodata in enhancing its services and offerings within the industry.
news.headline: Otodata acquires Dunraven Systems' Delta Software Platform after 20 years in advanced monitoring solutions. Founded in 2008.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado on May 14, 2025, Edgewise Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: EWTX) shared plans to participate in the RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference on May 20, 2025, at 9:00 am ET. The conference will feature presentations from the company, known for its focus on muscle disease biopharmaceuticals.
news.headline: Edgewise Therapeutics (Nasdaq: EWTX) to present at RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference on May 20, 2025, in Boulder, Colorado.

news.summary: United Bancorporation of Alabama, Inc., based in Atmore, Alabama, disclosed on May 14, 2025, that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a revamped stock repurchase initiative, known as the "Repurchase Program". This initiative enables the company to buy back a substantial amount of up to 337,380 shares under this program. The stock is listed as OTCQX: UBAB.
news.headline: United Bancorporation of Alabama, Inc. renews stock repurchase program, may repurchase up to 337,380 shares.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP disclosed an ongoing investigation into Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) to protect shareholders' interests. The inquiry aims to assess if Otis Worldwide Corporation's directors violated their fiduciary duties.
news.headline: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigating Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) for potential fiduciary breaches on behalf of shareholders.

news.summary: Amid rising trade tensions between the U.S. and China, recent data reveals notable changes in consumer spending patterns. The shift is evident as consumers move their purchases from Temu and SHEIN, two popular Chinese retailers, towards American counterparts. Specifically, there has been a significant increase in spending at U.S. retailers such as Old Navy, Ulta Beauty, and Nordstrom Rack. This trend is highlighted in data released on May 14, 2025. Consumer Edge (CE), a prominent provider of global consumer insights, conducted the analysis which showcases a marked increase in consumer preference for these American brands over their Chinese competitors. The data provides insights into the economic impact of the trade tensions between the two nations, with consumers redirecting their spending to support American businesses.
news.headline: U.S. shoppers shifting spending from Chinese platforms like Temu and SHEIN to American retailers like Old Navy and Nordstrom Rack. Trade tensions driving significant consumer spending shifts.

news.summary: DeFi Development Corp. reported its Q1 2025 financial results with significant improvements: 379% year-over-year growth in annual recurring revenue, SaaS revenue hitting around $191,000 (up 163% YoY), 31% increase in cash flow from operations, and a 19% reduction in net loss from operations. The company made strategic moves in the past 30 days, including acquiring a Solana validator business, forming partnerships with BitGo and Kraken, and purchasing a record 172,670 SOL on May 12, 2025, totaling their treasury holdings to 595,988 SOL. Operating metrics also showed improvements with a 13% decrease in loss from operations and a 19% decrease in net loss compared to Q1 2024. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: DeFi Dev Corp reports financial results for Q1 2025 with 379% YoY improvement in SaaS revenue to $191,000 and $100M in SOL holdings. Expands partnerships, changes name, and acquires validator business. Treasury holdings total 595,988 SOL. Operating expenses down 18%.

news.summary: Physicians from Concierge Choice Physicians (CCP) have introduced a groundbreaking healthcare approach that fosters enhanced doctor-patient connections. Based in Rockville Centre, New York, CCP is at the forefront of concierge medical services. On May 14, 2025, they announced this innovative model.
news.headline: Medical Clinic of Houston partners with Concierge Choice Physicians to offer personalized healthcare with closer doctor-patient relationships.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on May 14, 2025, Qvinci Software, a prominent company in financial and operational performance management technology, unveiled new products and upgrades. These innovations aim to further enhance their position as a frontrunner in catering to multi-entity operations.
news.headline: Qvinci Software unveils new products to aid financial analysis of multi-entity businesses, solidifying its position in the market.

news.summary: symplr®, a top provider of enterprise healthcare operations software, was recently recognized for its outstanding culture, operational excellence, and innovation with the symplr Operations Platform. The company received the prestigious U.S. Best Managed Company award on May 14, 2025. This acknowledgment is a testament to symplr's commitment to excellence in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: symplr named U.S. Best Managed Company for second year, recognized for culture, innovation, & operational excellence. #Healthcare #Award

news.summary: KALA BIO, Inc. is conducting a Phase 2b CHASE trial of KPI-012 for Persistent Corneal Epithelial Defect (PCED), with topline data expected in 3Q 2025. They have cash resources of $42.2 million as of March 31, 2025, which are expected to fund operations until 1Q 2026. Kala's lead product candidate, KPI-012, aims to address the impaired corneal healing that underlies severe ocular diseases. PCED affects approximately 100,000 patients in the US. KALA is exploring additional applications of KPI-012 and evaluating preclinical program KPI-014 for inherited retinal diseases. In the first quarter of 2025, KALA reported $4.6 million in general and administrative expenses, $6.1 million in research and development expenses, and an overall net loss of $8.9 million. The company focuses on developing innovative therapies for rare and severe eye diseases using its MSC-S platform.
news.headline: KALA BIO reported $42.2M cash in Q1 2025, ongoing Phase 2b trial, aiming for data in Q3 2025. Losses decreased, funds into Q1 2026.

news.summary: New findings confirm the ongoing Australian oncology clinical trial and advocate for further research on the Hemopurifier across various medical conditions. Aethlon Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: AEMD), specializing in medical therapeutics, is dedicated to producing treatments.
news.headline: Aethlon Medical's Hemopurifier® removes platelet-derived extracellular vesicles from plasma, supporting ongoing trials.

news.summary: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge, known for its slim design and advanced features, is now available for pre-order with Boost Mobile's nationwide network. This smartphone offers cutting-edge AI technology and camera capabilities. Customers can sign up for the pre-order through Boost Mobile's Infinite Access for Galaxy program. The release is set to take place in LITTLETON, Colo. Don't miss out on this opportunity to experience the value and durability of the Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge.
news.headline: Boost Mobile introduces the ultra-slim Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge with advanced AI and camera features. Pre-order now with Infinite Access for Galaxy.

news.summary: LiqTech International, Inc. announced its financial results for Q1 2025, with revenue reaching $4.6 million, a 36% increase from Q4 2024. The net loss for Q1 2025 was $(2.4) million. The company ended Q1 2025 with a cash balance of $10.4 million. For Q2 2025, LiqTech expects revenue to be between $4.8 million and $5.2 million. Operational highlights include a record order delivery to Razorback Direct and a joint venture with Jiangsu JiTRI Marine Equipment Co., Ltd. for marine ship water treatment systems. The company appointed David Kowalczyk as Chief Financial and Operating Officer. Specific financial details and operational achievements were highlighted in the report. LiqTech International, Inc. provides ceramic silicon carbide filtration technologies. The full story is available on Benzinga.com. (Word count: 1123)
news.headline: LiqTech International reported Q1 2025 revenue of $4.6 million, a sequential increase of 36%. Ending cash balance was $10.4 million. Multiple operational highlights indicated growth momentum going forward. CEO Fei Chen highlighted orders in various sectors contributing to revenue growth in Q2 2025. Financially, a 9% increase in revenue was noted, with a net loss of $(2.4) million. Gross profit margin fell to 2.7% due to various factors. Outlook for Q2 2025 revenue is set between $4.8 million and $5.2 million. Total operating expenses stayed at $2.3 million, but with some variations in categories like selling costs. Research and development expenses decreased slightly. Other expenses reduced by 51.4% compared to 2024. Net loss remained at $(2.4) million with a cash balance of $10.4 million as of March 31, 2025. The company is upbeat about future growth and profitability. KeyEvent: Record Q1 2025 revenue of $4.6 million, 36% increase from Q4 2024, ending cash balance $10.4 million, CEO highlights multiple growth initiatives for future.

news.summary: ADC Therapeutics SA reported financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025, with operational updates including the acceptance of the LOTIS-7 abstract for presentation at EHA2025 and ICML. ZYNLONTA plus glofitamab showed an ORR of 95.5% and CR of 90.9% with 40 patients enrolled in the LOTIS-7 trial's dose expansion arm for relapsed/refractory DLBCL. Cash runway is expected to fund catalysts into H2 of 2026. In Q1 2025, ZYNLONTA generated $17.4M in net product revenues, while R&D expenses were $28.9M. Net loss for the quarter was $38.6M, with cash and equivalents at $194.7M as of March 31. A conference call to discuss these results was scheduled for today at 8:30 a.m. EDT.
news.headline: ADC Therapeutics reported first quarter 2025 financial results, highlighting ZYNLONTA's ORR and CR rates in LOTIS-7 trial, with 40 patients enrolled. Cash runway expected into 2026. Presentation at major hematology conferences. Net product revenues at $17.4M, R&D expense $28.9M, adjusted net loss $24.0M. Company to host conference call for more details.

news.summary: Leatt Corporation, known for protective sports gear, reported strong financial results in Q1 2025, with revenues of $15.37 million, up 45% from Q1 2024. Helmet revenues surged by 101%. Gross profit reached $6.72 million, up 68%. Net income rose significantly by 237% to $1.12 million. Cash flows from operations were $768,000, and cash reserves stood at $12.70 million, up 3%. International distributor sales spiked by 79%, consumer-direct sales increased by 14%, while dealer-direct sales in the U.S. dropped by 9%. Leatt remains optimistic about future growth, focusing on innovation in product development and global sales expansion. The company's conference call discussed these results, highlighting achievements in different product categories. The financial tables detail assets and highlight a positive outlook for continued growth. Management remains confident about the future and is working to mitigate risks related to geopolitical and economic factors like the U.S. trade war. Leatt Corporation's global revenues are thriving, indicating a positive trajectory for the company's growth and value.
news.headline: Leatt Corp's Q1 2025 results show 45% revenue increase to $15.37M, net income up 237% to $1.12M. Strong sales across all product categories.

news.summary: Lucid Diagnostics Inc., a cancer prevention medical diagnostics company, reported processing 3,034 EsoGuard tests and recognized revenue of $0.8 million in 1Q25. They ended 1Q25 with over $40 million in proforma cash. Lucid's CEO highlighted progress in expanding cash-pay and contracted programs, gaining traction with insurers for EsoGuard coverage, and extending operational runway with secured capital. The company also launched a marketing campaign, partnered with a health system, and gained traction in sales channels. Financially, operating expenses were $13.3 million, with a GAAP net loss of approximately $36.0 million. Non-GAAP adjusted loss for the quarter was $11.2 million. Lucid's cash and cash equivalents were $25.2 million as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, the company completed a common stock offering post-quarter end, raising $16.1 million. Non-GAAP measures like EBITDA and non-GAAP adjusted loss were used to provide greater transparency in financial performance analysis. These measures are aimed at assisting investors and shareholders in making comparisons and analyzing the underlying performance of the company. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com - with a conference call and webcast scheduled for May 14, 2025, at 8:30 AM EDT.
news.headline: Lucid Diagnostics processed 3,034 EsoGuard tests, generated $0.8 million revenue in Q1 2025, ended with $40M cash.
TRUMP ARRIVES IN DOHA

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, INmune Bio Inc. (NASDAQ: INMB), a biotechnology company focusing on inflammation and immunology, shared news of its upcoming participation at the 2025 RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference. The event is scheduled for May 20-21, 2025, at the InterContinental Barclay NY. The Company aims to showcase its clinical-stage developments targeting the innate immune system during the conference.
news.headline: INmune Bio Inc. will attend 2025 RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference on May 20-21 at InterContinental Barclay NY.

news.summary: Redwood City, California, May 14, 2025 - Revolution Medicines, Inc. revealed that the initial patient has received treatment in the RASolve 301 trial, a Phase 3 clinical study conducted worldwide. The trial aims to assess the safety and effectiveness of daraxonrasib (RMC-6236), a RAS(ON) multi-selective inhibitor, in individuals with RAS mutant non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) that has been previously treated and is either locally advanced or metastatic. This study will compare the outcomes of daraxonrasib to docetaxel chemotherapy and is a significant development for the oncology company listed as Nasdaq: RVMD.
news.headline: Revolution Medicines begins Phase 3 trial for RAS mutant NSCLC patients with daraxonrasib. Patient dosed in RASolve 301.

news.summary: Technip Energies has appointed Marco Tiziano Barone as the Chief Legal Officer and a member of the Group Executive Committee. Barone will be responsible for overseeing the Legal, Contracts, and Compliance function of the company. He takes over from Michael McGuinty, who has chosen to retire from his position.
news.headline: Technip Energies names Marco Tiziano Barone new Chief Legal Officer, replacing Michael McGuinty who is retiring.

news.summary: The individual in the Trump administration responsible for supervising the Treasury Department's extensive financial activities disclosed ownership of stocks in numerous major banks and corporations engaged in transactions with the department.
news.headline: Treasury official overseeing operations owns stock in banks & companies working with dept, a potential conflict of interest.

news.summary: The GreenCare for Communities initiative is progressing with its second phase at Barrios Unidos Park. This project aims to enhance community well-being by improving green spaces. The initiative involves planting 500 new trees, installing 100 solar-powered lights, and creating 200 vegetable garden plots. This effort seeks to promote environmental sustainability and provide recreational opportunities for residents. The project is a collaborative endeavor involving local organizations, businesses, and volunteers, showcasing the power of community engagement in fostering positive change.
news.headline: Project EverGreen and ScottsMiracle-Gro are expanding green spaces at Barrios Unidos Park in heat-stressed Phoenix.

news.summary: PMGC Capital LLC, a subsidiary of PMGC Holdings Inc. listed on Nasdaq as ELAB, is set to file a Schedule 13D with the SEC disclosing their ownership of a 5.09% stake in Alaunos Therapeutics, Inc., a company also listed on Nasdaq as TCRT.
news.headline: PMGC Capital LLC, subsidiary of PMGC Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ELAB), plans to report 5.09% stake in Alaunos Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TCRT).
